title: Department Manager Vacancy at Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd!
